title: Tool Template Change Risk Audit — FINAL (Phase 20.7)

Jun 11: Meta 'What's YOUR monthly payment? Get personalized...' (Q&A hook)

summary: All 4 aggressive click-bait title/meta patterns have been SOFTENED to descriptive 'Example' format with parent calculator CTA. Investment-return meta (final value removal) KEPT as anti-cannibalization improvement.
